reviews.review_description:
I enjoyed the zero stress factor to this game. The puzzles are fairly straightforward, graphics are okay, and the storyline goes quick but includes lots of fun and sarcasm. 

I finished this game in a couple of hours and by no means do I race through games like this. I prefer to take my time and notice all the small details of a game. 

I recommend this one if you want a short game with a few giggles thrown in. 

Interesting choice to make at the end...

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for this! 'campy fun with a few giggles' is pretty much exactly what we were going for, so it's great to hear that landed. You're right that the game runs on the shorter side, and we appreciate you noting the detail-noticing playstyle; it means a lot that the sarcasm and small touches came through. Glad you enjoyed it, and we hope to see you back in the sequel!

reviews.review_description: Story and gameplay were both very interesting. Puzzles were also quite nice. I would like it more if it was larger, so you would immerse more into the storyline, but it was good enough to make me want to play Retropolis 2 for sure.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words. We're really glad the story and puzzles landed well for you. You're not alone in wishing there was more world to explore, and it's something we kept in mind as we built Retropolis 2. We hope it scratches that itch. Enjoy the sequel!

reviews.review_description: If your a fan of classic point and click adventure games or just love a good comedic noir this game is for you! The only down side is its very short about an hour and a half but the characters and interactions make it worth it

developer_response.body: Glad the characters and comedy landed for you. The length is something we hear often and it genuinely shaped how we approached the sequel, so if you want more, Retropolis 2 has you covered. Come hang out with us on Discord and see what we're building next.

reviews.review_description: Love the noir vibe, the humour, the graphics and the gameplay, and the voice acting was on point. Very disappointed by it taking less then an hour to complete though. I understand the next one has been developed with that complaint in mind and I'm looking forward to playing it. Hopefully it won't disappoint and I'll be able to spend more time in this beautifully constructed world!

developer_response.body: The noir vibe landing so well means a lot to us, and we're glad the humor, visuals, and voice acting hit the mark. We hear you on the length, and you're right that the sequel was built with exactly that feedback in mind. We can't wait for you to spend more time in the world.

reviews.review_title: Point and click mystery game in vr
reviews.review_description: This game is excellent!! The story is great, the puzzles are difficult but not so difficult as to be frustrating. The mystery is intriguing and you just want to know more. The only criticism I can give is that it’s too short!!!

developer_response.body: Really glad the story and puzzles hit that sweet spot for you. We hear you on the length when we made Retropolis 2, and it's something that stays with us as we keep building in this world. Come join our community and follow along for what's next.

reviews.review_description:
I was pleasantly surprised by this game! Didn't know what to expect. I loved the point and click adventure games back in the day and this does a great job of capturing that magic in VR!
The art style is stylish and creative. Perfectly matches the Noire tone whilst giving it levity in a cartoony way. It's very immersive.
The voice acting is really good! The main character actually reminds me a bit of Kumail Nanjiani. Ha. The humour is sometimes a bit too quirky but mostly very funny. Especially how they play on the classic point and click format of commenting on everything that you click on, even if you click more than once. Some of the humour had me actually laugh out loud, especially the comment about being the greatest actress. Haha!
The concept and story are quite fresh. It's serious but comedic all at once.
Cool that it supports hand-tracking! Which functions well on the clicking. Although the thumb gestures for looking around are a bit awkward. Still, that's a cool idea for doing it.
It is very short, but short and sweet. It doesn't overstay its welcome and serves as a great set up for the next game, which I look forward to checking! Give this a try, it's like being part of a comedic film Noire! 
Well done, devs! Keep it up, and I'll let you know what I think of the sequel! I'm excited!

developer_response.body:
It is fantastic to hear that the "point-and-click" nostalgia translated so well for you in VR! We had a blast writing those repetitive click comments, so knowing they actually made you laugh out loud is a huge win for us.

Since you are already gearing up for the sequel, you are in for a treat. We took that "film noir" foundation and built something much longer and deeper, with even more of that quirky humor you enjoyed. Can't wait to hear your thoughts on how the next chapter measures up!

reviews.review_description: It's really fun to play, interesting and cures boredom, I don't normally replay or rewatch many things but I'm definitely gonna replay this

developer_response.body: Really glad it's got that replay pull to it. If you want more to dig into, Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye carries the story forward and is a good bit longer. Hope you enjoy it just as much.

reviews.review_description:
The game is fairly short but it was still enjoyable. I bought it on sale and it was well worth what I paid. The voice acting of the main character could be a little better but the rest of the characters were well done. Most puzzles aren't massively taxing but there were still a few moments I was left scratching my head for a bit.

From what I hear the second game is much longer and so this was a good taster for that. On to number 2 next.

developer_response.body:
We’re so glad you found it worth the play! It’s great to hear those head-scratching puzzle moments hit the right balance for you.

You've heard correctly! Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye is a much bigger experience, with even deeper puzzles and a more expansive story. We can't wait to hear what you think of the next chapter!

reviews.review_description: This game is in my top 3 games, i love the story and style of this gem. Will always come back and play again. The art, the characters, the concept is just so amazing. Even though its not a very long game, its still great. Would recommend to many people.

developer_response.body:
It is an incredible honor to be in your top three! Knowing that you're already planning to revisit the City of Robots because of the art and characters is the best compliment we could receive.

If you loved the story and the concept, you definitely need to see how the mystery expands.

Check out the sequel, Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye!

reviews.review_description:
A fantastic narrative VR experience with a unique retro-futuristic style.
Retropolis delivers a clever mix of storytelling, puzzles and atmosphere across two episodes. A must-play for fans of story-driven VR games.

developer_response.body: We are so glad the atmosphere and story clicked for you! Since you enjoyed both episodes of the game, you definitely need to see where the mystery goes next. The sequel give a deeper dive into the city of Robots. Check out the sequel, Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye! Looking forward to hearing your thoughts on it.

reviews.review_description: I loved playing this one!  The storyline was great and the puzzles can be challenging.  It was a bit short but looking forward to the sequel.  BTW the sarcasm was pure gold!

developer_response.body:
We’re so glad the sarcasm hit the mark for you. Thanks for leaving this review :)
We can’t wait to see what you think of the sequel!

reviews.review_description: A game with a story. Some parts stumped me so although it is point and click things are not always easy to figure out.  Really enjoyed it

developer_response.body: It's great to hear that some of those puzzles really made you stop and think! We wanted the investigation to feel earned. Since you enjoyed the challenge, you’ll love the sequel. It’s a much longer and deeper experience with even more intricate mysteries to unwrap. Continue the investigation in Retropolis 2!

reviews.review_description:
Yes, it's a short game, and you can finish it in one session or two, but you will have so much fun playing it.
It's witty, and it's easy to play.
It's a gem.
Oh, and then you will want to play the second game :)

כל הכבוד לחברת הפיתוח!

developer_response.body:
It’s a huge boost to know the humor and style clicked for you. We poured a lot of heart into making this a memorable ride, and your review is the best compliment we could ask for.

Since you're ready for the next chapter, you’ll love the sequel. It’s a significantly deeper and more expansive VR experience that builds on everything you just played.

תודה רבה על המילים החמות, איזה כיף לקרוא!

reviews.review_description:
the devs so clearly put so much love and heart into this game! the world is gorgeous, with so much thought and creativity put into every detail. i have so much respect for the creators, and i hope there are many more games to come. even though it's short, it feels like it's the beginning of a story, not one that's cut short. playing a point and click like this in vr is such a fun experience, and the noir style was the perfect choice! i absolutely love the gameplay, and i truly had a smile on my face every moment i was playing.

thank you for creating such a beautiful immersive story 🫶 wish there were more games like this in virtual reality

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for such a heartfelt review! Reading that you had a smile on your face the whole time is exactly why we make games. We are so glad the noir atmosphere and the point-and-click style resonated with you.

You hit the nail on the head—this truly was just the beginning! We’re excited to share that the second game is out now, and it’s a much longer, deeper dive into that world you enjoyed. We put that same "love and heart" into expanding the story and the puzzles, and we can’t wait for you to experience where the journey goes next! 🫶

reviews.review_description: Simple but yet so much fun , so much I brought part 2 .nice one devs.

developer_response.body:
It’s awesome to hear you had enough fun with the first one to jump straight into the sequel! We’re thrilled to have you continuing the investigation.

We'd love to have you in our community to hear what you think as you dive into Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye, and we can’t wait to read your review on the second one!

reviews.review_description: ￼ The city looks like a cell shaded version of Rapture from Boston’s. 👍

developer_response.body:
It is a huge compliment to have the city compared to Rapture. We’re so glad the visuals stood out to you. Every corner of the city and all its inhabitants were lovingly painted in Quill by hand to give the world that unique, hand-crafted feel.

Since you enjoyed the aesthetic, you definitely need to see how the world expands in the next chapter. Check out the sequel, Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye!

reviews.review_description: ...much shorter than I expected. Enjoyed the puzzles and the gameplay but was surprised how quickly it came to an end.

developer_response.body:
It’s great to hear the puzzles clicked for you! Feedback exactly like yours is what drove us to make the sequel a much longer and deeper experience. If you’re looking for a more substantial stay in the City of Robots, you’ll find exactly what you're looking for in the next chapter.

Continue the story in Retropolis 2!

reviews.review_description: Picking up a VR was hard just because I’m picky about graphics but this was the perfect game to get me started with it. The art style didn’t feel like some old outdated video game it just felt like its own thing, which was very refreshing. This games story was very short and sweet but I’m currently on the second one having a lot of fun.

developer_response.body:
It’s awesome that our art style was what finally got you into VR! We really wanted to create something that felt like stepping into a living illustration rather than just a traditional "game," so hearing that it felt refreshing is a huge win for us.

Thank you so much for playing and for sharing your thoughts. We’re so glad you’re already diving into the sequel. we worked hard to make it a much longer and deeper experience, and we really hope you love the next chapter just as much.

We’re looking forward to hearing what you think of Retropolis 2!

reviews.review_description: As i played this game I shed tears at this master crafted story I love the music, how colors turn the beutiful scenes into a pallet of master class, if this story could be better made it would make game of the universe. I love the setting, the music, the color, the characters, the voice actors, brought to absolute cinema. Infinity  times a billion stars out of 5.

developer_response.body: We couldn't ask for a better compliment than your review! Hearing that the story and music moved you to tears is why we do what we do. If you haven't already, you should absolutely play Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye. It continues the story with even more heart and cinematic moments! Curious to hear your thought on it as well. Thank you so much again.

reviews.review_title: A lousy detective gets a good girlfriend
reviews.review_description: I like everything about this game. the art style looks just like a comic book, the characters are relatable and funny, the puzzles are easy to understand but hard enough to stump a teenager. And the voice acting is on par with everything else. If I must complain about the game. Then I despise of how the game has no artificial turning. But everything else is perfect. This just shows that even if the developers have no budget. A masterpiece can still be made. I also love of how you guys give out concept art out to people after you beat the game. Just goes to show the love that went into this. I definitely recommend. 5/5 stars.

developer_response.body:
Happy New Year and thank you for such a thoughtful review! We’re thrilled that the characters and the comic-book style resonated with you—and we’re glad you enjoyed that bonus concept art! We really wanted players to see the "soul" behind the scenes.

Regarding the turning: we hear you! We are always looking for ways to improve the experience based on player feedback. If you're looking for the next chapter of the story, you'll be happy to know that Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye is out now! It’s a much larger game with even more of the art and humor you loved.

reviews.review_description: Loved the storyline graphic was very good also

developer_response.body:
We're so glad you enjoyed the journey! It's great to hear that both the storyline and the art style hit the mark for you. If you loved the story, you'll definitely want to see where the mystery leads next.

Check out the sequel, Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye!

reviews.review_description: Cool

developer_response.body:
Merci beaucoup ! On est ravis que ça vous plaise.

Si vous avez aimé l'ambiance, allez voir la suite : Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye !

reviews.review_description:
At $10 i would expect to be entertained for longer than the 45 minutes it took to listen to the narration.
Boring, not worth it, save your redeem/money for something that you can play more than once.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the honest feedback. We're sorry the experience didn't meet your expectations regarding length and value. We take these comments seriously as they help us improve our future projects. We appreciate you giving Retropolis a try!

reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed this game, but was so disappointed at how short it was. Am I missing something?

developer_response.body:
It's great to hear you enjoyed the vibe, and you didn't miss a thing—it really is a bite-sized introduction to our world.

Feedback just like yours is exactly why we built the sequel to be a much longer and deeper experience. If you're looking for a more substantial mystery to solve, you'll find it waiting for you in the next chapter.

Check out the sequel, Retropolis 2!

reviews.review_description: Essentially a demo

developer_response.body:
We hear you loud and clear. It was feedback exactly like this that pushed us to make the sequel a much more substantial and polished experience. If you’re looking for a deeper dive into this world, you’ll find it there.

Check out Retropolis 2 for a much longer and more refined journey.

reviews.review_description: What a great game! This was so enjoyable. It was short, but the follow on game was much longer. This one gave a back story to the next one in the series. Highly recommend

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for playing and sharing! It’s awesome that you appreciated how this chapter sets the stage for the rest of the series.

Since you've already experienced the longer, deeper journey of the sequel, we'd love to have you in our community to see what’s coming next.

Join our Discord and sign up for the newsletter to stay in the loop!

reviews.review_description: Quite easy to complete whole thing in one session, but a great story and graphics. I can't get the final promo code to work to buy the second volume so thats disapointing... OK thanks for getting me the updated promo code - on that basis your game gets a solid 4* and i'm really enjoying the sequel too ;-)

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words about the story and graphics! We’re sorry to hear you’re having trouble with the promo code for the sequel. Let us try and help! Please contact our support team at support@peanutbutton.net or join our Discord so we can fix this for you!

reviews.review_description: I think this game is great!! On the short side but very entertaining. I just started playing the second game and I think this is a good game for anyone who enjoys story and some puzzle solving. The devs really did an excellent job with this game!!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much! We’re thrilled to hear you’ve already started the second game. 🤖 Since you enjoy the story and puzzles, you’re in for a much bigger adventure in Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye!

We’d love to have you in our community to hear what you think of the continuation. Join our Discord or mailing list to stay updated on what's next from Peanut Button.

reviews.review_description: I’ll probably play it a bunch of times and even let my family members try it out

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! Knowing you'll be coming back and sharing it with family genuinely makes our day. We hope everyone in your crew has a great time with it. See you in there!

reviews.review_description: I like this game that’s awesome

developer_response.body:
That is an incredible compliment! Thank you so much for playing and for sharing that with us.

If you're ready for more, you should definitely jump into Retropolis 2. It’s a much longer and deeper experience that takes everything you loved about the first one to the next level.

See you in the sequel!

reviews.review_description:
Dude this was actually the most best game of all I ever played the voice actions is insanely top notch along with animations and cutscenes and….
 THE LORRRRREEEEE!

developer_response.body:
hat is such an incredible reaction! 🤖 It means the world to the Peanut Button team that the voice acting and the hidden secrets of the world moved you that much.

If you’re ready for the next chapter of the mystery, Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye is waiting for you with even deeper narrative stakes. Thank you for being such a passionate fan!

reviews.review_description: I absolutely LOVE this game! The voice acting, the design, the storyline, EVERYTHING is just amazing! Literally beat this game in one session because the game was that good!

developer_response.body:
Knowing you couldn't put the game down is the best compliment we could hope for.

If you're already craving more, the mystery continues right now in Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye. It’s a much larger and deeper game with even more of that design and storyline you loved! Hope you get to enjo it too.

reviews.review_description:
even though i found some of the puzzles dificult the story paid off for it , i loved every last second and the ending left me waiting .

great game cant wait to play the next

developer_response.body: We're so glad the story and cinematic feel made those difficult puzzles worth it for you. Hope you'll like the sequel just as much if not more 🎬

reviews.review_description: This game is hilarious some good puzzles , quite short,I enjoyed it

developer_response.body:
We're so glad the humor and puzzles landed for you! Since you enjoyed the vibe but found it a bit quick, you'll love the sequel. Retropolis 2 is a much longer and deeper experience that expands on everything you just played.

Thanks for playing and sharing your thoughts!

reviews.review_description: Really enjoyed this interactive story....

developer_response.body:
It's awesome to hear you enjoyed stepping into our interactive world!

If you're ready for the next chapter, you should definitely check out the sequel. It’s a much longer and deeper experience that really expands on the story and atmosphere you just played.

reviews.review_title: Top game ..... dont forget to play 2
reviews.review_description: love it, 2 even better

developer_response.body:
Thanks for playing and sharing your experience! We’re so glad you enjoyed both chapters. we really poured everything into making the sequel a much longer and deeper journey.

Join our Discord and sign up for the newsletter to see what’s next!

reviews.review_description: Yes its short but i had fun and the story is beautiful and its a little easy but i love this game

developer_response.body: We’re so happy to hear you loved the story and had a great time in Retropolis! If you're looking for a deeper challenge and a much longer journey, you’ll love the sequel, Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye. It expands on everything from the first game with more complex puzzles and a bigger world to explore!

reviews.review_description: Very entertaining and recommend this one and part 2..waiting impatiently for part 3 😊

developer_response.body:
you so much for the double recommendation! 🤖 We love your enthusiasm for a third part. While we haven't announced it yet, we have many more stories to tell in this universe.

If you want to be the first to hear what’s next from the Peanut Button team, come join our Discord or mailing list.

reviews.review_description: This game is so beautiful. It really is such an artwork. I wish it was longer.

developer_response.body: Thank you! We poured our hearts into the art style, so hearing it called an "artwork" means the world to us. 🎨 If you haven't already, you should definitely check out Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye—it’s a much longer experience with even more detailed, hand-painted environments!

reviews.review_description: this is like i expect you to die but more old movie and less grab and do stuff. I really enjoy ed it need more of this sires. Sorry im a bad speller

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We love that "old movie" feel too, and comparing us to I Expect You To Die is a huge honor! If you want more of this series, you’re in luck—the sequel, Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye, is out now and it’s a much bigger, deeper adventure.

reviews.review_description: such a good game

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We’re thrilled you enjoyed it. 🤖 If you loved the atmosphere and the world, you should definitely check out the sequel, Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye! Thanks again

reviews.review_description: I replay this every few months. Love it. Want more 😂

developer_response.body: WOW! Replaying every few months is the ultimate compliment! 🤖 If you haven't already, you should definitely check out Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye—it’s a much longer, deeper adventure. Thanks for being such a fan!

reviews.review_description: Tried to request a refund. Says not eligible because I played for two hours. I played maybe 10 minutes and never played the second one and can’t get a refund on that one either. Will dispute charges

developer_response.body: Hi there. Sorry to hear you tried the game and didn't like it. The platform takes care of refunds, so not much we can do on our side as the dev. If there was an error, we encourage you to go ahead and ask the platform to have another look at this.

reviews.review_description: I loved playing this game, it was awesome. It's because you have to use your surroundings and observe what's around you, to determine what you need to complete the level. Great game

developer_response.body: Thanks for the support! 🔎 We’re so glad you enjoyed the environmental puzzles. If you liked observing the world for clues, you'll love Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye—it’s a much bigger world with even more clever mysteries to solve!

reviews.review_description:
🔥🔥🔥 "The Secret of Reteopolis" on Meta Quest is a GAME CHANGER! 🤯 I just busted out laughing my head off in the middle of my VR adventure 😂. This game's got dark humor that's SO on point, and the story? Sucked me in like a black hole 🌌.

Fun fact: I'm still reeling from that one plot twist 🤯. The graphics are insane, and the gameplay is super smooth. If you're into quirky, entertaining VR experiences, look no further! 🎮👾 5 stars isn't enough – I'd give it 10 stars if I could 😍

developer_response.body:
We’re so glad the humor landed and that the twist caught you off guard. If you’re still reeling from that one, you definitely need to see where the story goes next.

The mystery continues in Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye, with even more of that dark humor and cinematic storytelling you loved. Thanks for the 🔥 review!

reviews.review_title: Solve those puzzles to finish the story
reviews.review_description:
It took me almost 1,5h to finish the game. 

A story game with puzzles. Solve the puzzle to continue the story about the diva.

Tried this one because I love puzzle games and escape rooms.

Now gonna try Retropolis 2.

developer_response.body:
It’s awesome to see those escape room instincts in action! We’re thrilled you enjoyed navigating the diva’s story and clearing those challenges in one go.

Since you're heading into the sequel next, prepare for a much more massive undertaking. It’s a significantly deeper experience with complex layers that really push the boundaries of the city of Robots.

reviews.review_description: I usually hate puzzle games. but these puzzles are so rewarding! For an example, my favourite puzzle was the envelope one. where you would get a book about bribery and read it. one of the pages says “don’t just give money to a robot use and envelope.” And the next page is “if you can’t find an envelope make your own.” YOU NEEDED TO PUT THE MONEY IN THE BOOK! THIS GAME IS SO GOOD!

developer_response.body:
Reading this made our day! There’s no bigger compliment than winning over someone who usually doesn't like puzzle games. We’re so glad that specific "bribery" logic clicked for you! We love designing those "aha!" moments where everything just falls into place.

If you enjoyed that style of thinking, you will absolutely love Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye. It has even more of those rewarding, creative puzzles and a much longer story to get lost in.

reviews.review_description:
This was a lot of fun and had that old school detective story feel to it. Made me want a Di*k Tracy VR game! Now to play the 2nd one!!

(can't believe I hadbto censor Tracy's first name..)

developer_response.body:
Haha, we appreciate you fighting the censors to give us that comparison! That D. Tracy vibe is exactly what we were aiming for, so it’s awesome to hear it hit the mark for you.

We are so excited for you to jump into Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye. See you on the other side of the case!

reviews.review_description: the game looks fun

developer_response.body: It definitely is! If you're looking for a unique VR experience, give it a try. If you want a much longer and deeper mystery after, the sequel Retropolis 2 is waiting for you. Thanks for the interest!

reviews.review_description: I loved the game but it is a very short game the puzzles are great though. If you like i except you to die, you'll love this!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much! Being compared to I Expect You To Die is a huge honor for us. 🤖 We’re glad you loved the puzzles, and we totally hear you on the length.

If you haven't already, you should definitely check out Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye. It’s a much larger, deeper game built specifically for fans who wanted more!

reviews.review_description: I really love this game, that’s it

developer_response.body: We’re so glad you loved your time in Retropolis. If you're looking for more, the story continues in Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye, which is a much bigger experience with even more to love! Thank you for the review!

reviews.review_description: Great game made in a basement 👏. Finished way too quickly. It's not very difficult, keep clicking away, and you will get there. The nightclub was the best challenge. All said and done, I am looking forward to the 2nd game. I got both in the sale, so happy days. Keep up the good work.

developer_response.body: Thanks for hopping into Retropolis, Rabbit_Reedy 🐇 We're glad you enjoyed the ride—even if it ended too soon! The sequel, Never Say Goodbye, is a deeper dive with more challenge, more story, and more time in the city of robots. Can’t wait to hear what you think of it!

reviews.review_description: Tres court

developer_response.body: Merci d’avoir joué ! Le Secret de Retropolis est une courte introduction à notre monde robotique noir — on espère que vous essayerez Retropolis 2, une aventure bien plus longue avec plus d’histoire et de mécaniques de jeu.

reviews.review_title: Nice setting, but more like a demo
reviews.review_description: I like the setting but it's extremely short (an hour or so), so not very demanding.

developer_response.body: Thanks, babubi76! We're really glad the world of Retropolis caught your eye, even if the first game's length left you wanting more. That’s a big part of why we made Never Say Goodbye - it's a much deeper and more expansive journey that builds on everything you saw here. We saw you left a review on the sequel as well, so hopefully it  brought you the kind of longer deeper experience you looked for.

reviews.review_description: I love point and click games, and I love narrative and puzzle style games and this game has all of this. Amazing story, great soundtrack and humour. It gives me nostalgic feelings of point and click games I’ve played on PC but so much more fun in VR. Please keep making these types of games!! I do wish it was longer but heard the sequel is so I’m playing that now :)

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, SKNYVR! It’s amazing to hear that Retropolis brought back that classic point-and-click nostalgia but made it even more fun for you in VR—that’s exactly what we hoped to capture!

We totally get wanting more, and it’s awesome that you’re diving into the sequel—it’s a much bigger adventure! Also, since you loved the soundtrack, you might enjoy revisiting the music from both games on all major streaming services like Spotify and Apple Music. And if you’re curious about what we’re working on next, join our community—we’d love to have you along for the journey! 😊🎶

reviews.review_description: Excellent game.  My only criticism is length.  Everything else was thoroughly enjoyable!  Would definitely recommend.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, Natman62! We’re thrilled you had such a great time with The Secret of Retropolis! We hear you on the length, and that’s exactly why we made "Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye" a much bigger adventure. Hope you check it out and enjoy the ride! 😊🚀

reviews.review_description: The voice acting is well done, and there are many moments where you can tell that intention and care has been given. Just that laser pointer from the hands that fits into the world should tell you how considered these devs are! Quite excellent!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, Rattyt! It means a lot to hear that the attention to detail stood out to you—that’s exactly what we strive for. We love crafting a world that feels thoughtful and immersive, so your words truly make our day! If you’re up for more, Retropolis 2: Never Say Goodbye takes things even further—we’d love for you to experience the next chapter and hear your thoughts!

reviews.review_description: What a waste.  Don’t purchase this game because you have only one story to figure out then have to pay for the second level. It was less than an hour to pass this game.  Wish someone would have written that down in a review before I bought it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your thoughts, and we're genuinely sorry to hear the game didn't fully meet your expectations regarding length. We understand the importance of clear communication about game content and value. It's worth noting that "Retropolis 2" was designed to offer a much longer gameplay experience, based on community feedback like yours, to ensure players have a richer and more immersive journey. While this doesn't change your experience with "The Secret of Retropolis," we hope it demonstrates our commitment to listening to our players and enhancing our games. Thank you for your feedback; it's crucial for our growth and improvement.

reviews.review_title: Too short to be worth paying for
reviews.review_description: Pretty sure you can complete the entire game in under twenty minutes on your first attempt without any prior knowledge

developer_response.body:
Hi and thanks for writing.

Most players we've talked to finish the game in about an hour, and experienced puzzle players do it in about 45 minute. Could it be that you thought the game ended before it did? Please note that there are 2 parts - the first part takes about 15-20 minutes. If that's indeed the case, you'll be able to continue from the game's main menu and play the second half. If you finish the whole game and feel disappointed, we recommend asking for a refund from the platform. Best, the PB team

reviews.review_description:
I should have read the reviews before purchasing this game. It had a great look about it and I thought it would be an interesting and intriguing puzzle game and so just as I got I to the game…. It ended!
Puzzles (I think two or three?) are EASY and yet at the end I still don’t understand why it was called what it is called!
So many missed opportunities 
Such a shame.

developer_response.body:
Dear krispydogg,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us. We're sorry to hear that our game didn't meet your expectations. We appreciate your honest thoughts and understand your disappointment.

As game developers, we take feedback seriously, and we are constantly striving to improve our games based on community input. We are currently working on a sequel game that will include more complex puzzles and a longer gameplay experience. We hope that you'll give us another chance in the future.

Thank you again for playing our game and for sharing your thoughts with us.

Best regards,
Asaf from Peanut Button

reviews.review_title: COMPLETE BS (THIS SHOULD BE A DEMO)
reviews.review_description: This game starts out pretty great and then you find out that there’s only two chapters and it takes about 30 minutes to finish… don’t waste your money this isn’t even a full game…. Very disappointing, I bought this game when it came out and (since i work) didn’t get a chance to play for a couple weeks) now I can’t even ask for a refund! This is the first vr game I’ve bought that I literally feel ripped off…. If they added a couple more cases the length of the first one I would say this was worth the price - as it is now I’d feel fine at 5 bucks…

developer_response.body:
Hi Headapohlb622. 

We're so sorry to hear you were disappointed with the game's length. This is a short game, and we see it's beaten especially quickly by experienced gamers. We hear the feedback, and dropped the price of the game to $9.99, as well as enabled "Try Before You Buy" so users can check if it's the game for them. We're also in talks with the platform to be included in more sales and promotions. Last but not least, the sequel game comes very soon, and takes 4-5 hours of gameplay. We'd be happy to include you in the closed beta to hear your thoughts on it. Please write us through our website or on our discord server, and we'll arrange that.

Yours truly,
Asaf from Peanut Button

reviews.review_description: I expected more. The game was so short. I wish I could get a refund or another short game. This game can't be replayed from other perspectives. Don't waste your money.

developer_response.body: Hi there CeceRaja. Sorry to hear you had a bad experience with our game. If you played less than 2 hours, I think you should be able to get a refund for the game from the platform.

reviews.review_description: Great game, fun to play. Can't wait for the sequel
This game was over in like 45 mins. Very elementary, certainly NOT worth the money.

developer_response.body: We're really sorry to hear about your experience. Normally the platform allows refunds in such cases, so we recommend asking them to do so. We're always trying to improve, and we hope you'll like our next installment better. Best regards, Asaf from Peanut Button

reviews.review_description:
I'm gutted with this game! I brought it based on the amount of positive reviews and after completing the 2 parts in less than an hour I thought I must have accidently restarted or something? Definitely not worth the money for less than an hour of play! 
The game was fun to play but I wouldn't advise any of my friends to buy as once you've completed it once it isn't something you would go back to and do again.

developer_response.body:
Hi 00-Mell-00. 

So sorry to hear you were disappointed with the game's length. It's a short game, and it's finished even faster by experienced gamers like yourself, who get the solutions to all the puzzles right away.

We hear our audience on that issue, we're working hard to produce longer and more challenging content for them.

We really hope you'll like our future work better, but in the meantime, we suggest talking with the platform to see if you can get a refund for your copy.

Yours truly,
The Peanut Button team.

reviews.review_description: I went into this with reviews crowing about the great story and voice acting. I think they oversold it by a LOT. Graphics and art style are fine, story is fine. Voice acting is distractingly bad, particularly for the main character. The illusion of choice/role play in this world is very thin, amounting to a few options for dialogue which clearly doesn't change the story significantly. Experience on rails, no real immersion or choice. Way way way short. Even on sale for $9, I played less than an hour and finished the first of only two (boring) chapters, and am asking for a return. Whoever gave this 5 stars hasn't played this genre of game enough to know how weak it is. Harsh truth but truth. Spend your money elsewhere.
The storyline of the game I enjoyed, especially the interactive response you can choose. The only down side is their is only 2 missions then the game is over I wish it was longer.
The game is over in 15 minutes.  It's not good that this was so expensive for so little content.
This game was fun but it was super quick. Over in less than an hour. Not worth the $13 imo.

1. Over in about 45 minutes. It is like 4 scenes of any consequence.
2. The story is pretty boring. The characters are undeveloped, I just didn't care about any of them. In the end there's no satisfaction in the end. Very linear, feels like I don't actually make any choices. 
3. The voice acting is a big part of the character problem. The main characters all sound bored all the time.
4. The graphics are low-poly, as you can see from the previews, no problem. But if you try Walkabout Mini Golf, that's low-poly graphics too and 10x more immersive. This is low poly done wrong, feels rushed and incomplete.
5.  The puzzles aren't interesting in a good way. Frequently feels 'stuck', because you get repeated dialog with no clue about what to do next. Look at I Expect You To Die 1 + 2, a similar experience but with much better puzzle design. 
6. Your inventory is in a floating suitcase you can't put away, so it is always in the scene and keeps the game from feeling immersive. Needs a method like Job Simulator where you can summon and put away your backpack. Again, this suitcase feels like the game is unfinished.

If you can get it at half off it would be OK, but $13 for a half-baked 45 minute mini-movie is not good value for money.
This was way to short it took about an hour to finish .I'm gutted I spent 10 quid on it. It's over priced for what it is.
Short but sweet experience proving that point and click games can be decent in VR
Yes you guys can do vreality but like do something open world next time. This game is not relaxing it makes me feel stuck in one place.
Ok game as far as it went. Fully complete in under 30min.

The noir genre had its heyday back when its tropes were novel and TVs were exclusively monochrome — but as the genre progressed, media like this has arised. Thank goodness.

This game was a work of art constructed by a team who clearly had experience with noir, sci-fi, and comedy, and their experience was clearly evident in the gameplay experience. It was intricately detailed, fluid, nuanced, reflexive, and FUN. After I finished it, I immediately went looking to download a sequel.

If you’ve ever wanted to be a snarky robot detective with a dark past and a drinking problem, this is as close as you can get. Until maybe 3022. And even then, the drinking problem will likely have to be of your own accord.

Definitely check this bad boy out. It is more than the sum of its parts — parts which would alone sum to an absolute fortune.

Cheers!

It was an experience and not much else you get half an hour of fun out of it and then boom it's over it could use more substance but the puzzles were fun and unique the characters had personality I thoroughly enjoyed this game but could use more

This game was very intriguing and it was able to keep my interest the entire time. My only problem is that the game wasn’t very long and I truly want more. Can’t wait for the sequel, this game is great.

I actually loved this game, but there’s only one negative, and it’s the length of the game. Now the game is beautiful, pretty fun, and story is very engaging and interesting, and I enjoyed every minute. Now the only negative being length, I think this took me maybe 2-3 hours to complete? Which really isn’t that long, but the game’s also cheap so it doesn’t matter much. I’d almost treat it as a demo to something that could be a series, as they say they do want to create a sequel, which I have my fingers crossed for.

The adage is "Always leave them wanting  more."  And this game does just that. It is clever, funny, and perfect for fans of noir.  I didn't want it to end, but it does fairly  quickly.  I got it on sale and felt it was worth the  price. But only expect an hour or two of play. I am eagerly looking forward to a sequel!

I recently went to the oculus store to find some games I can just buy and relax to and then I can across this game. I read the reviews and looked through the video and pictures of the game. I thought it would just be a set of cases or puzzles that you’d have to sit and click through but oh boy I was wrong. I fell in love with this game and the art style. I love the 50s detective jazzy style it had going with a little bit of Detective Gadget￼ inspiration to it. I love the story, I won’t say anything Bc I don’t want to spoil anything to it. 

   My only complaint is how short it is. I sat through the game for about 40 minutes and by the end of the game I wanted more. This is the only take away from the game. I would 100% recommend this game and I will definitely play it over and over.
